briefs.title: Tobacco and Vapour Retailers Must Display New Warning Decals by April 1, 2026
briefs.summary: BC is replacing the current required warning decals for tobacco and vapour product sellers with two new ones: one displayed to customers at the point of sale, and one displayed to staff near the cash register.
briefs.action_required: Replace your current tobacco/vapour warning decals with the new Schedule 1.4 (customer) and Schedule 1.5 (staff) decals by April 1, 2026.

key_dates.label: BC tobacco and vapour new decal requirements take effect
